category_sources: source_facts.description says Harbour is a portable xBase-compatible programming language and environment; official homepage describes it as a cross-platform xBase-compatible programming language implementation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides harbour; official homepage uses Harbour.
docs_sources: Official Harbour site hosts the Harbour Reference Guide under /doc/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Harbour homepage links source snapshots to GitHub and official search result identifies harbour/core as the live source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe xBase/Clipper compatibility, compiler/runtime libraries, and cross-platform support.
